programme.title: Kung Ikaw Ay Isang Panaginip
programme.desc: A young woman becomes infatuated with the picture of a man on a billboard. Her dull life takes an interesting turn when the picture suddenly springs to life.

programme.title: Fall Back
programme.desc: Michelle is so scared of heartbreak in her present relationship that having a backup boyfriend seems like a good idea. Fate further eggs her on by bringing an ex back into her life.

programme.title: Makamandag na Bala
programme.desc: The soldiers Ricardo and Samuel stand in the way of the illegal activities of Mayor Antero Sanchez's son Tonie which cause danger in their lives.

programme.title: Ibulong Mo Sa Diyos
programme.desc: A dancer gets hit by a car after her boyfriend leaves for Japan; the driver of the car helps her. Soon, they fall in love and get married, but that complicates matters further for her.

programme.title: Call Center Girl
programme.desc: Theresa is in a race against time to reunite her family and win back the affection of her estranged daughter.

programme.title: Wanted Perfect Murder
programme.desc: Jake and Elvis, two close friends, decide to join forces and set out to clear their names after they are falsely accused of a crime.

programme.title: The Achy Breaky Hearts
programme.desc: Chinggay's life takes a turn when she has to choose between two men who meet the criteria for everything she desires in a life partner.

programme.title: Bala ko... Bahala sa 'yo
programme.desc: After being suspended from the police force for botching up a hostage rescue operation, a cop and his assistant decide to take the law into their own hands and exact punishment on a dollar racketing gang. But they face resistance from the underworld.

programme.title: Kambal Tuko
programme.desc: Kokoy and Tokoy are the conjoined twin sons of Mely and Andoy. When they get kidnapped, the boys set off on their own adventure through a series of circumstances.

programme.desc: Features interviews with Cher’s Silkwood producer Michael Hausman, Sonny & Cher manager Harvey Kresky, film critic Kirk Honeycutt, plus many more.

programme.title: Air Warriors S11
programme.desc: This documentary series shows five generations of jet engines. These fighter jets are capable of carrying bombs and soar close to the edge of space. The sixth generation of fighter jets began in 2020, and the 11th season has covered most of the air artillery since then.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw catches up with a cousin from his father's side of the family to learn how he has been making Hainanese chicken rice for over 30 years.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam learns to make authentic beef rendang from a local Muslim family. He visits the National Archives of Singapore to learn about his mother's family, and continues his search for inspiration for his Singapore banquet dinner.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam visits Peranakan food legend Violet Oon's restaurant, National Kitchen. He then heads to Chinatown to visit Aussie Dave Pynt's restaurant, Burnt Ends.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam goes in search of the best seafood that Singapore has to offer. His journey begins inside the Marina Bay Sands resort complex where many celebrity chefs have opened eateries.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw continues his search for seafood inspiration by heading to the famous Newton Food Centre. He gives a masterclass on how to line up a seafood feast like no other.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw goes in search of Singapore's best vegetable dishes, kicking off with a traditional breakfast at Singapore Zoo, including kaya toast with half-cooked eggs and coffee.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In his quest to find the best ingredients for his banquet dinner, Adam Liaw visits a colourful fruit and veg market in Geylang and a Michelin-starred restaurant.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: In between some cocktail-tasting pit stops, Adam Liaw discovers some of the finest desserts in Singapore, from homemade Peranakan sweet treats to a sophisticated dessert bar.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: Singapore
programme.desc: Adam Liaw gathers what he has learned over the past few weeks to serve up an impressive five-course banquet dinner to some distinguished guests, including his mother.

programme.title: Expedition X (S6)
programme.desc: Recent sightings of a massive bird send Phil and Heather into western Pennsylvania to hunt the mythical Thunderbird and uncover its legendary secrets.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Joe and Matt face a journey of epic proportions in the Bolivian Andes.

programme.title: In The Eye Of The Storm (S2)
programme.desc: Hurricane Helene barrels north, causing massive flooding in Appalachia. As the deluge sweeps away one woman, a man jumps into the water to save her.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Wheeler Dealers World Tour (S2)
programme.desc: In Sao Paulo, the boys buy a Brazilian designed VW SP2. It's a dream come true for Mike, but the car lacks power and Elvis has to give it some brawn.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: Mike takes the family on a trip down memory lane. He finds new cars for his dad and sister and helps Richard Hammond’s mum sell her MX5 for charity.

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)
programme.desc: Farmtruck and AZN travel to Kentucky to meet local small-tire racers racing for $5,000. The last local standing gets to take on Jerry Bird.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: One of KevDogg's favourite cars has arrived, and he leads the charge on the build. When Kev's plan doesn’t work out, he enlists the help of a local dealer.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: Drivers witness acrobatic crashes. An aggressive driver faces a big problem. A motorist dodges a bullet. An angry driver follows a woman home.

programme.title: Road Rage (S2)
programme.desc: A furious driver takes out his anger on another car. Motorcyclists deal with aggressive drivers. A biker faces off with a bat-wielding man.

programme.title: Space Race: Mysteries At The Museum
programme.desc: Don Wildman explores the race to the moon between the US and the Soviet Union.

programme.title: Border Control: Sweden (S2)
programme.desc: The security and customs services at the border of Sweden are on constant watch to stop illegal items from entering the country. It’s their job to detect crime.

programme.title: Kindig Customs (S10)
programme.desc: From the outside, a '57 Bel Air has all the markings of a classic but needs a lot of work. The customer also wants a bigger engine.

programme.title: Sin City Tow (S1)
programme.desc: It's NYE in Vegas and things get wild: partygoers hit Ashley's, Elmer makes a life-changing choice, and Pineapple faces his boss's wrath.

programme.title: Mike Brewer: Born Dealer (S1)
programme.desc: A visit to a popular car show inspires Mike to organise his own event in an effort to promote his expanding business – but will anyone turn up?

programme.title: Street Outlaws: Locals Only (S2)
programme.desc: New England Dragway hosts Farmtruck and AZN and the next Locals Only event. The winner will get to negotiate a race against Disco Dean.

programme.desc: Mike and Elvis head to sun drenched Portugal where the iconic Mini Moke has earned cult status. It's a car with a very special place in Mike's heart.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Ambulance Australia follows the state's Ambulance Services from the Triple Zero Control Centres to paramedics on the road.

programme.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programme.desc: An unlikely hero takes on laws that silence citizens and reignites a democratic struggle older than the nation itself. (Final)

programme.title: Shaun Micallef's Origin Odyssey
programme.desc: Host Shaun Micallef travels to Switzerland with radio presenter and comedian Michael 'Wippa' Wipfli to understand more about his Swiss heritage.

programme.title: National Press Club Address
programme.desc: The National Press Club hosts public debates and discussions that shape Australia now and into the future. Home to national conversations with decision-makers and influencers; driving the national debate forward.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Lorna Dunkley brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: Class is in session: comedian Frida Deguise and Indigenous culinary consultant Sam May join Adam for an ode to old school cooking.

programme.title: The Chef's Garden
programme.desc: Chef Massimo Mele pairs delicious Tongola goat curd with freshly-picked beetroot and vegetables. Then it's into the pure Tassie waters where Massimo samples some of the world's best oysters.

programme.title: Bondi Rescue
programme.desc: Bondi Rescue follows the work of the elite professional lifeguards who patrol Australia's busiest beach.

programme.title: AFL Premiership Season

programme.title: Judgment: Cases That Changed Australia
programme.desc: An unlikely hero takes on laws that silence citizens and reignites a democratic struggle older than the nation itself. (Final)

programme.title: I Was Actually There
programme.desc: The 1998 Sydney to Hobart race was a moment when nature asserted its dominance with terrifying force. Six lives were lost, five yachts sank and hundreds of sailors were pulled into a brutal fight for survival. (Final)

programme.title: Ambulance Australia
programme.desc: Ambulance Australia follows the state's Ambulance Services from the Triple Zero Control Centres to paramedics on the road.

programme.title: The Business
programme.desc: Australia's leading daily business and finance show, bringing you up to date on market moves, economic trends and the forces affecting consumers, investors, employees and businesses big and small. Presented by Alicia Barry.

Sarah Ferguson presents Australia's premier daily current affairs program, delivering agenda-setting public affairs journalism and interviews that hold the powerful to account. Plus political analysis from Jacob Greber.

programme.title: Long Travels Across the World - EP 1 隆行天下之重走八千里路云和月
programme.desc: With respect for history and passion for the present, this program embarks on a journey through time. Thirty years ago, the program offered a groundbreaking, authentic view of mainland China, becoming a vital emotional link across the Taiwan Strait. Now, Wu Qilong and Xing Aowei retrace that journey, exploring the land's stunning transformation—from economic growth to technological innovation, cultural continuity to social progress.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 19 至死不渝

programme.title: Focus - EP 17 焦点

programme.title: The Demon Hunter's Romance - EP 14 无忧渡
programme.desc: In Guangping City, where humans and demons coexist, Ban Xia, a wealthy girl with the rare ability to see demons' true forms, is deemed delusional by her family. After exposing her cousin’s bride as a demon, she’s forced to flee and meets demon hunter Xuan Ye. He helps her see the hidden world more clearly and reveals not all demons are evil. As they investigate her father's mysterious death and other strange events, their bond deepens.

programme.title: The Legend of Heroes - Hot Blooded - EP 27 金庸武侠世界之铁血丹心
programme.desc: The foolish young lad, Guo Jing, ultimately matures into a national hero who stands for the country and the people, embodying the true essence of chivalry.

programme.title: The Indigenous - EP 2 部落探秘
programme.desc: Explorer Sugie visits Tanzania to meet the Hadzabe, one of Africa’s oldest hunter-gatherer tribes. He joins them in hunting and foraging to experience their traditional tribal life. But with a fear of hunting, can Sugie overcome his inner fears and complete this journey of discovery?

Each scoop contains freeze-dried Hass avocado (about 1 whole avocado), plus red date, soy, quinoa, wheatgrass, and tiger milk mushroom for steady energy. No added sugar, dairy, or gluten. Also available in cocoa flavor with cocoa, astaxanthin, and chia seeds for a richer chocolate taste. AvoMilk 是一款植物营养饮品，含牛油果、植物蛋白和膳食纤维，帮助补充营养并增加饱足感。采用冻干牛油果技术，约等于一颗牛油果的营养，再加红枣、非转基因黄豆、藜麦、小麦草和虎乳芝。无添加糖、无奶、无麸质，一冲即饮，顺滑方便。还有可可口味，加入可可粉、虾青素和奇亚籽，像健康巧克力饮品。
